summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Bad Bridgets
film.talent: Colin Farrell, Steve Coogan, Charlie Heaton, Domhnall Gleeson, Himesh Patel, Niamh Algar, Simone Kirby, Emilia Jones, Alison Oliver
film.announcement: Netflix-backed Irish period thriller directed by Rich Peppiatt adds Colin Farrell, Steve Coogan, and additional cast members to the ensemble.

film.title: Eat Your Heart Out
film.talent: Tania Raymonde, Brian Austin Green, Steve Agee, Breanna Yde
film.announcement: Horror-comedy musical film greenlit with cast including Tania Raymonde, Brian Austin Green, Steve Agee, and Breanna Yde.

tv.title: Bad Bridgets
tv.talent: Colin Farrell, Steve Coogan, Charlie Heaton, Domhnall Gleeson, Himesh Patel, Niamh Algar, Simone Kirby, Emilia Jones, Alison Oliver
tv.announcement: Netflix-backed Irish period thriller directed by Rich Peppiatt adds Colin Farrell, Steve Coogan, and additional cast members to the ensemble.

tv.title: The Lady Grace Mysteries
tv.announcement: Teen spy series returns for Season 2.

tv.title: La Vida Barcelona
tv.announcement: Romantic dramedy series directed by Katina Medina Mora boarded by Beta Film.
